                  <jats:p>
                    We consider the problem of the recovery of a Robin coefficient on a part
                    <jats:italic>γ</jats:italic>
                    ⊂ ∂Ω of the boundary of a bounded domain Ω from the principal eigenvalue and the boundary values of the normal derivative of the principal eigenfunction of the Laplace operator with Dirichlet boundary condition on ∂Ω\
                    <jats:italic>γ</jats:italic>
                    . We prove the uniqueness, as well as local Lipschitz stability of the inverse problem. Moreover, we present an iterative reconstruction algorithm with numerical computations in two dimensions showing the accuracy of the method.
